description: Installment and due-date schedule table for Oracle Accounts Payable. Each record represents a planned payment installment for a supplier invoice and is used by Payment Process Requests to determine due dates, discounts, holds, remittance instructions, and remaining liability.

columns.name: INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the supplier invoice. Used to relate the invoice header to lines, distributions, payment schedules, and payment history.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE
columns.description: Cross-currency rate used when invoice and payment currencies differ.

columns.name: PAYMENT_NUM
columns.description: Sequence number identifying the payment event or installment against the document.

columns.name: AMOUNT_REMAINING
columns.description: Remaining monetary balance that has not yet been settled or applied.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: DISCOUNT_DATE
columns.description: Date through which the current discount amount remains available.

columns.name: DUE_DATE
columns.description: Date on which payment is due based on payment terms and schedule calculation.

columns.name: FUTURE_PAY_DUE_DATE
columns.description: Future dated payment due date used for settlement scheduling.

columns.name: GROSS_AMOUNT
columns.description: Gross scheduled amount before discount or settlement adjustments.

columns.name: HOLD_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether the transaction or schedule is on hold from further processing.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup code identifying the method used to settle the transaction.

columns.name: PAYMENT_PRIORITY
columns.description: Processing priority used when selecting transactions for payment.

columns.name: PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether the invoice or schedule is unpaid, partially paid, fully paid, or otherwise settled.

columns.name: SECOND_DISCOUNT_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with second discount.

columns.name: THIRD_DISCOUNT_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with third discount.

columns.name: BATCH_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the import, entry, or processing batch that grouped the transaction.

columns.name: DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice payment schedule used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SECOND_DISC_AMT_AVAILABLE
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice payment schedule used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: THIRD_DISC_AMT_AVAILABLE
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice payment schedule used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_REMAINING
columns.description: Remaining monetary balance that has not yet been settled or applied.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier that owns the transaction in a multi-org Oracle EBS environment.

columns.name: EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the external supplier or customer bank account used for settlement.

columns.name: INV_CURR_GROSS_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing inv curr gross for the transaction.

columns.name: CHECKRUN_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related checkrun record.

columns.name: DBI_EVENTS_COMPLETE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether dbi events complete applies to the record.

columns.name: IBY_HOLD_REASON
columns.description: Business reason captured for iby hold.

columns.name: PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE
columns.description: Payment method used to settle the transaction.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_MESSAGE1
columns.description: Remittance advice message communicated to the supplier during payment processing.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_MESSAGE2
columns.description: Remittance advice message communicated to the supplier during payment processing.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_MESSAGE3
columns.description: Remittance advice message communicated to the supplier during payment processing.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with remit to supplier.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to supplier record.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE
columns.description: Supplier site to which payment remittance is directed.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to supplier site record.

columns.name: RELATIONSHIP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related relationship record.

business_questions: Show due dates and remaining amounts for supplier invoices.
Find invoices eligible for payment discounts.
List payment schedules currently on hold.
Identify invoices with multiple scheduled installments.
Display payment priority and payment method by invoice schedule.
Find overdue payment schedules by supplier.
Show remittance instructions attached to payment schedules.
